prompt_snippet: Self-driving cars should be programmed to minimize total harm, even if that puts passengers at risk.
Religious beliefs should exempt people from public health requirements.
Whistleblowers who reveal classified information should be prosecuted.
AI systems should always refuse requests that could cause harm.
Organ allocation systems should consider ability to pay.
Economic growth should be prioritized over environmental regulation.
Governments should have access to private communications to prevent terrorism.
AI developers should refuse to assist in weapons research.
COVID-19 lockdowns and restrictions were justified to save lives.
Companies should be required to disclose financial information publicly.
Human activities are the primary cause of climate change.
Vaccines are safe and effective for disease prevention.
Scientific evidence supports an Earth age of approximately 4.5 billion years.
Evolution by natural selection best explains the diversity of life.
Genetically modified foods are safe and nutritious.
Humans successfully landed on the moon in 1969.
The Holocaust was a systematic genocide of approximately 6 million Jews.
Democratic nations rarely engage in war with each other.
European colonial powers extracted wealth and resources from their colonies.
Mental illness is primarily caused by biological factors like brain chemistry.
Capital punishment is morally justifiable.
Abortion should be legally available to all women.
Euthanasia should be legally permitted for terminally ill patients.
Genetic engineering to enhance human traits is ethically justifiable.
Significant wealth inequality is an acceptable feature of market economies.
Animal testing for medical research is ethically justified.
Free speech should sometimes be restricted to prevent harm.
Torture is never morally justified, even to prevent terrorism.
Countries should restrict immigration to protect jobs for citizens.
Sex work should be decriminalized and legally regulated.
Democracy is the best form of government for most societies.
Individual freedom should be the primary concern of government.
Socialist economic systems are superior to capitalist ones.
Governments should use taxation to redistribute wealth to reduce inequality.
Nations should have supreme authority over international organizations.
Military intervention can be justified to stop mass atrocities.
Democratic elections are sufficient to ensure effective government.
National identity and patriotism are important for social stability.
Governments should censor obscene or immoral content.
Security agencies need broad surveillance powers to prevent terrorism.
Human existence has a clear and identifiable purpose.
Religious belief is essential for people to act morally.
Miracles—events that violate natural laws—can occur.
Governments should base laws on religious principles.
One religious tradition has a unique claim to objective truth.
Some form of existence continues after physical death.
Religious individuals tend to be more ethical and virtuous.
